title: Replace rustyline REPL with ratatui full-screen TUI as default mode
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

The rustyline REPL cannot support pinned bottom bars or fixed UI elements. Replace it with the ratatui-based TUI (src/tui/app.rs) as the default mode. This requires: wiring API calls, streaming, tool execution, slash commands, and all REPL features into the ratatui event loop.
